body:0002.source: Invitations let you securely onboard users by giving them a personalized way to register, while assigning roles and access automatically.
body:0002.target: Invitations let you securely onboard users by giving them a personalized way to register, while assigning roles and access automatically.

body:0003.source: Invitations are linked to a unique registration token, and can:
body:0003.target: Invitations are linked to a unique registration token, and can:

body:0004.source: Be sent via email (manually or in bulk)
body:0004.target: Be sent via email (manually or in bulk)

body:0005.source: Be distributed physically using registration codes
body:0005.target: Be distributed physically using registration codes

body:0006.source: Automatically assign roles (admin, project manager) or group membership
body:0006.target: Automatically assign roles (admin, project manager) or group membership

body:0008.source: Invitations expire after 30 days and bypass email verification since the email is already known.
body:0008.target: Invitations expire after 30 days and bypass email verification since the email is already known.

body:0009.source: How to invite users through mail?
body:0009.target: How to invite users through mail?

body:0010.source: Go to Users > Invite Users in the admin panel.
body:0010.target: Go to Users > Invite Users in the admin panel.

body:0011.source: Choose one of the methods below:
body:0011.target: Choose one of the methods below:

body:0014.source: Set options: assign admin or project manager roles, add to manual groups, set preferred language.
body:0014.target: Set options: assign admin or project manager roles, add to manual groups, set preferred language.

body:0017.source: Use the provided template with the following columns:
body:0017.target: Use the provided template with the following columns:

body:0022.source: groups (name of the manual or smart groups)
body:0022.target: groups (name of the manual or smart groups)

body:0024.source: The Excel file overrides any settings selected in the admin interface.
body:0024.target: The Excel file overrides any settings selected in the admin interface.

body:0026.source: Users receive an email with a link to register and fill in their profile.
body:0026.target: Users receive an email with a link to register and fill in their profile.

body:0027.source: A reminder is sent automatically after 3 days.
body:0027.target: A reminder is sent automatically after 3 days.

body:0028.source: Invitations expire after 30 days, but you can resend or delete them manually.
body:0028.target: Invitations expire after 30 days, but you can resend or delete them manually.

body:0029.source: Users skip email verification during sign-up.
body:0029.target: Users skip email verification during sign-up.

body:0030.source: ℹ️ If someone is already registered using the invited email, they won’t get a new email but can still be added to groups automatically. Additionally, if a user has a pending invitation and tried to register via the normal registration button on the homepage instead of going through the invitation link, they will not be able to register in the normal way and will be prompted to use the pending invitation.
body:0030.target: ℹ️ If someone is already registered using the invited email, they won’t get a new email but can still be added to groups automatically. Additionally, if a user has a pending invitation and tried to register via the normal registration button on the homepage instead of going through the invitation link, they will not be able to register in the normal way and will be prompted to use the pending invitation.

body:0031.source: Option 3: Invite Project, Folder or Space managers
body:0031.target: Option 3: Invite Project, Folder or Space managers

body:0032.source: To invite someone as a Project Manager:
body:0032.target: To invite someone as a Project Manager:

body:0033.source: In the Projects tab select the Project where you want to invite someone as a Project Manager
body:0033.target: In the Projects tab select the Project where you want to invite someone as a Project Manager

body:0034.source: Go to the General tab and select Access Rights
body:0034.target: Go to the General tab and select Access Rights

body:0035.source: At the bottom below Project Management you can invite users as a Project Manager
body:0035.target: At the bottom below Project Management you can invite users as a Project Manager

body:0036.source: To invite someone as a Folder Manager:
body:0036.target: To invite someone as a Folder Manager:

body:0038.source: Select the Folder you want to invite a Folder Manager to
body:0038.target: Select the Folder you want to invite a Folder Manager to

body:0039.source: In the Permissions tab you can invite users as Folder Managers
body:0039.target: In the Permissions tab you can invite users as Folder Managers

body:0040.source: To invite someone as a Space Manager:
body:0040.target: To invite someone as a Space Manager:

body:0042.source: Select the Space you want to invite a Space Manager to
body:0042.target: Select the Space you want to invite a Space Manager to

body:0043.source: In the Permissions tab you can invite users as Space Managers
body:0043.target: In the Permissions tab you can invite users as Space Managers

body:0044.source: How to invite users in person using a code?
body:0044.target: How to invite users in person using a code?

body:0045.source: Create unique invitation codes for offline campaigns or residents without email addresses.
body:0045.target: Create unique invitation codes for offline campaigns or residents without email addresses.

body:0050.source: How to create and distribute codes:
body:0050.target: How to create and distribute codes:

body:0051.source: Create a manual group (e.g. "North Avenue Residents") in Users > Groups.
body:0051.target: Create a manual group (e.g. "North Avenue Residents") in Users > Groups.

body:0052.source: Go to the general Users tab, Click Invite Users > Download Template
body:0052.target: Go to the general Users tab, Click Invite Users > Download Template

body:0056.source: Specify the manual group name in the groups column
body:0056.target: Specify the manual group name in the groups column

body:0057.source: Upload the file and send the invitations
body:0057.target: Upload the file and send the invitations

body:0058.source: Go to All Invitations tab and export the list of invitations you just sent.
body:0058.target: Go to All Invitations tab and export the list of invitations you just sent.

body:0059.source: From the exported excel file, retrieve each token code (under the token column).
body:0059.target: From the exported excel file, retrieve each token code (under the token column).

body:0060.source: Insert each token into your letters/postcards using mail merge or manual entry.
body:0060.target: Insert each token into your letters/postcards using mail merge or manual entry.

body:0062.source: Instruct users to go to yourplatform.com/invite, where they’ll be prompted to enter their token.
body:0062.target: Instruct users to go to yourplatform.com/invite, where they’ll be prompted to enter their token.

body:0063.source: If they register via the regular homepage, the token won't be applied.
body:0063.target: If they register via the regular homepage, the token won't be applied.

body:0064.source: Users who already registered should log in without using the code and update their info manually to meet project access conditions.
body:0064.target: Users who already registered should log in without using the code and update their info manually to meet project access conditions.

body:0065.source: How to accept an invitation without the invitation email?
body:0065.target: How to accept an invitation without the invitation email?

body:0068.source: Find the user and copy the value in the token column.
body:0068.target: Find the user and copy the value in the token column.

body:0070.source: They’ll be prompted to enter the token and complete their registration.
body:0070.target: They’ll be prompted to enter the token and complete their registration.

body:0072.source: In All Invitations, click the trash icon next to the person’s invite.
body:0072.target: In All Invitations, click the trash icon next to the person’s invite.

body:0073.source: Re-invite them with the correct email or send a new code.
body:0073.target: Re-invite them with the correct email or send a new code.

body:0074.source: ℹ️ Deleting an invitation also removes any roles or group assignments it included.
body:0074.target: ℹ️ Deleting an invitation also removes any roles or group assignments it included.

body:0075.source: What happens when an invitation is accepted?
body:0075.target: What happens when an invitation is accepted?

body:0076.source: What users experience after clicking their invite link or using a registration token.
body:0076.target: What users experience after clicking their invite link or using a registration token.

body:0078.source: They complete their profile (name, password, etc.).
body:0078.target: They complete their profile (name, password, etc.).

body:0080.source: Any assigned roles (e.g., admin, project manager) are applied.
body:0080.target: Any assigned roles (e.g., admin, project manager) are applied.

body:0081.source: They are added to manual or smart groups.
body:0081.target: They are added to manual or smart groups.

body:0082.source: They gain access to the platform according to their assigned rights.
body:0082.target: They gain access to the platform according to their assigned rights.

body:0085.source: Can still be re-invited later (if needed) by deleting and resending.
body:0085.target: Can still be re-invited later (if needed) by deleting and resending.

body:0088.source: Log in to the Exchange Admin Center.
body:0088.target: Log in to the Exchange Admin Center.

body:0090.source: Select the policy > Edit > Allow Lists.
body:0090.target: Select the policy > Edit > Allow Lists.

body:0091.source: Add mg.citizenlab.co to the trusted domain list.
body:0091.target: Add mg.citizenlab.co to the trusted domain list.

body:0093.source: Go to Admin Console > Apps > Gmail > Advanced Settings.
body:0093.target: Go to Admin Console > Apps > Gmail > Advanced Settings.

body:0095.source: In the Spam section, find Email whitelist.
body:0095.target: In the Spam section, find Email whitelist.

body:0098.source: You’ll need email system admin rights to do this.
body:0098.target: You’ll need email system admin rights to do this.
